Description:
Grants <UIForeground>F201FA</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201FB</UIGlow>Holy Sheltron<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground>.
<UIForeground>F201F8</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F9</UIGlow>Holy Sheltron Effect: <UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground>Creates a barrier around self that absorbs damage equivalent to a heal of 10,000 potency
<UIForeground>F201F8</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F9</UIGlow>Duration: <UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground>4s
If the barrier is not absorbed and the effect duration expires, deals unaspected damage to all nearby enemies with a potency equal to 100% of the barrier's remaining potency, and grants <UIForeground>F201FA</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201FB</UIGlow>Sword Oath<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> to self.
<UIForeground>F201F8</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F9</UIGlow>Sword Oath Effect: <UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground>Increases damage dealt by 10%
<UIForeground>F201F8</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F9</UIGlow>Duration: <UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground>8s
<UIForeground>F201F8</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F9</UIGlow>Additional Effect: <UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground><UIForeground>F201FA</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201FB</UIGlow>Heavy<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> +75%
<UIForeground>F201F8</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F9</UIGlow>Duration: <UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground>4s
Grants <UIForeground>F201FA</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201FB</UIGlow>Shield Oath<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> when barrier is completely absorbed.
<UIForeground>F201F8</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F9</UIGlow>Shield Oath Effect: <UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground>Reduces damage taken by 20%

Covers target's body in a slow-burning pitch. Action is changed to <UIForeground>F201F4</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F5</UIGlow>Detonator<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> for the duration of the effect.

<UIForeground>F201F8</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F9</UIGlow>Duration: <UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground>8s
